component.name: FluxTuner
component.summary: Modern internet radio player with GTK and terminal interfaces

description.p: FluxTuner is a lightweight internet radio player featuring both a modern GTK4 graphical interface and a fast Textual terminal interface.
Browse and play thousands of internet radio stations with support for:

ul.li: Favorites and custom tags
Dynamic playlists
Live stream metadata
Theme support
Estimated data usage tracking
Multiple playback backends (mpv and ffplay)

description.p: FluxTuner is designed to work well both on modern desktop environments and lightweight Linux systems.

screenshot.caption: Search and play internet radio stations
Fast terminal interface powered by Textual

ul.li: Fixed TUI station details rendering and side-panel layout after line breaks.
Improved GTK GUI side-panel navigation by grouping Favorites and History under a Library section.
Improved GTK GUI status messages for search, favorites, history and tag playlist views.
Added a History view to the GTK GUI, matching the existing TUI history flow.
Fixed GTK GUI playback history persistence so played stations are available from the shared history.
Stabilized player backend handling for mpv and ffplay.
Improved TUI playback, favorites, playlists and history behavior.
Improved GUI backend capability handling.
Updated Flatpak packaging metadata.
Added Flatpak support with GUI and TUI launchers.
Improved GTK and Textual feature parity.
Added automatic playback backend detection.
Improved favorites, tags and playlist management.
Improved metadata and data usage tracking.
